zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert III Stewart King of Scotland於1337年8月14日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾時，他的父親Robert II Stewart King of Scotland21歲，母親Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan17歲。他於1365年3月13日與Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1406年4月4日在英國蘇格蘭布特洛賽享年68歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert III Stewart King of Scotland于1337年8月14日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾凱爾时，他的父亲Robert II Stewart King of Scotland21岁，母亲Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan17岁。他于1365年3月13日与Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland在英国苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1406年4月4日在英国苏格兰布特洛賽享年68岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利佩斯利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert III Stewart King of Scotland was born on 14 August 1337, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, was 17. He married Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland on 13 March 1365, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 April 1406, in Rothesay, Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert III Stewart King of Scotland est né le 14 août 1337, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland le 13 mars 1365, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1406, à Rothesay, Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

März 1365 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. April 1406 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Rothesay, Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Sc: 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Robert III Stewart King of Scotland(이)가 1337년 8월 14일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert II Stewart King of Scotland(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1365년 3월 13일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1406년 4월 4일 영국 스코틀랜드 부트 로트지에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리 파이슬리 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert III Stewart King of Scotland nasceu em 14 de agosto de 1337, em Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland em 13 de março de 1365, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1406, em Rothesay, Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Sc: пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert III Stewart King of Scotland родился 14 августа 1337 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert II Stewart King of Scotland было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland 13 марта 1365 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 апреля 1406 г. в местности ротесеи, бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности пеисли эбби, пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland el 13 de marzo de 1365, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas.
